text:
Only with Grok understanding every language and recommending content can this be done.

This has been a long-time goal.
RT @nikitabier: The largest cultural exchange in history just dropped.

还可以手机上配合重力感应
https://t.co/MBghK8Rlut

飞书 CLI 开源了，为什么 AI Agent 时代，大家都在做命令行工具？

飞书刚开源了一个命令行工具 lark-cli，能让 AI Agent 直接操作飞书：发消息、查日历、写文档、建多维表格、发邮件、管任务。你跟 AI 说一句话，它自己去操作飞书完成任务。

类似的 CLI 还很多，三周前 Google 也开源了 gws，让 AI https://t.co/IRiBN8I3EB

富文本编辑器的排版
https://t.co/3YT2uGV97s

人喜欢 GUI 是天性，我自己就更喜欢 codex 的 GUI，但人用 GUI 和 Agent 用 CLI 不冲突的。
比如飞书的 CLI 我们自己不会用一点关系没有，只要让 Agent 会用，我们指挥 Agent 用就够了
https://t.co/AvplKKrYkM

The easiest way to make money fast from a superhuman artificial intelligence would be in the financial markets, almost by definition. So the first lab to develop one, if AGI is possible, would almost certainly keep it quiet for as long as they could. Beats charging for API access

It is not even clear that anyone would know they were trading against an AGI, because, also by definition, it would be better at hiding any evidence that it was a counterparty than any human could detect. Someone would just get very rich, very fast. Or the AI would, depending.

Sorry, ASI, not AGI.

And to all the people saying that they don't see how ASI could discover something that humans and trading algos have not discovered... the very definition of ASI requires that it should be able to do so!

RT @godofprompt: BREAKING: Wisconsin and MIT just proved that every AI coding benchmark is measuring the wrong thing.

> Pass rate stays hi…

I know we all complain about the algorithm sometimes - but you can't deny X has improved a TON. 

Auto-translation is one example. Search is also way better, and tagging Grok is genuinely useful (and sometimes very funny) now.

And Imagine is getting crazy good at image + video.

这期播客太神奇了
xiaolai通过 self talk 劫持自己的潜意识
戒掉了烟，戒掉了咖啡，戒掉了碳水
人的大脑如此奇妙，甚至奇幻
习惯不过是一个潜意识的循环
打破它也很简单
自己跟自己说：
 I’m a person who never smoke because it stinks. https://t.co/88nAwRW6Y4
